'''bavocho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:jibberish|jibberish]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-v-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jibberish|jibberish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| bavocho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:bævecheth|bævecheth]] || [[word:bævechej|bævechej]] || [[word:bævechesh|bævechesh]] || [[word:bæveche|bæveche]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:bavovochoth|bavovochoth]] || [[word:bavovochoj|bavovochoj]] || [[word:bavovochosh|bavovochosh]] || [[word:bavovocho|bavovocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:bavochoth|bavochoth]] || [[word:bavochoj|bavochoj]] || [[word:bavochosh|bavochosh]] || [[word:bavocho|bavocho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:bavofchoth|bavofchoth]] || [[word:bavofchoj|bavofchoj]] || [[word:bavofchosh|bavofchosh]] || [[word:bavofchof|bavofchof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:bavochotho|bavochotho]] || [[word:bavochojo|bavochojo]] || [[word:bavochosho|bavochosho]] || [[word:bavochoko|bavochoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:bavochoth|bavochoth]] || [[word:bavochoj|bavochoj]] || [[word:bavochosh|bavochosh]] || [[word:bavocho|bavocho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:bavochothol|bavochothol]] || [[word:bavochojol|bavochojol]] || [[word:bavochoshol|bavochoshol]] || [[word:bavochokol|bavochokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:bavochothotho|bavochothotho]] || [[word:bavochojojo|bavochojojo]] || [[word:bavochoshosho|bavochoshosho]] || [[word:bavochoko|bavochoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:bavochothon|bavochothon]] || [[word:bavochojon|bavochojon]] || [[word:bavochoshon|bavochoshon]] || [[word:bavochokon|bavochokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:bavochothoro|bavochothoro]] || [[word:bavochojoro|bavochojoro]] || [[word:bavochoshoro|bavochoshoro]] || [[word:bavochokoro|bavochokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
